headline: How The Story Around PayPal Holdings (PYPL) Is Shifting With Mixed Views And Takeover Talk
summary: PayPal’s fair value estimate has been adjusted only slightly, moving from US$52.74 to US$53.00, which keeps the modeled price target tightly aligned with prior work. That small change sits against a mixed analyst backdrop, where some highlight valuation support and possible takeover interest, while others point to competitive pressure, execution risk, and trimmed targets across the US$40s to US$50s range. As you read on, you will see how these competing views shape the current story around...

headline: Mizuho Downgrades PayPal to Neutral Citing X’s Threat to Venmo: Is the PYPL Comeback Story Over?
summary: PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) stock picked up a fresh analyst downgrade Thursday morning, and the rationale cuts to the heart of the company’s long-term growth story. Mizuho downgraded PayPal to Neutral from Outperform, slashing its price target from $60 to $50, citing rising competitive and fundamental headwinds. For investors who’ve been holding on through a rough stretch, ... Mizuho Downgrades PayPal to Neutral Citing X’s Threat to Venmo: Is the PYPL Comeback Story Over?
